title: pahudia borneensis
intro: Pahudia borneensis is a plant species native to Borneo, belonging to the family Annonaceae, and is also known as the Borneo custard apple. The medicinal properties of Pahudia borneensis include its antifungal and antibacterial properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Pahudia borneensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Pahudia borneensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are used to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
